channel.title: Murmur
channel.description: Updates for Murmur, private on-device speech-to-text for macOS.

item.title: Version 0.5.0
item.description:
• Fixed dictation and meetings not recording your microphone while Bluetooth headphones were connected.
  • Added a microphone picker in Settings to choose which mic to record from.
  • Updates now install automatically in the background with no confirmation, and never interrupt a recording. New "Keep Murmur up to date automatically" toggle and "Check Now" button in Settings.
  • New first-run defaults: Murmur shows in the Dock and menu bar, dictation works by tap or hold, and it launches at login.
  • Meeting transcripts no longer make speaker names bold.
